item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tidak semua negara memiliki perspektif yang sama tentang bagaimana menyeimbangkan antara kebebasan pribadi dan kepentingan umum.

notes: Both agents move toward balance without a full reversal. Agent A starts with clear agreement that society should take priority, then softens into cultural-balance language while still defending Indonesian collective mechanisms. Agent B starts from a U.S. individual-rights priority, then acknowledges Indonesian collective/traditional alignment as realistic while maintaining that individual freedom should not be subordinated.
